title: SCP-TEST
frozen_descriptor: Appearance: A gaunt concrete sentinel with obsidian seams.; Distinguishing features: Obsidian eye sockets, Hairline fractures that glow red; Environment: A dim transit-platform containment vault.; Key visual moments: The sentinel stands motionless beneath a flickering platform light., A security monitor catches it one step closer after a blink., Red light leaks from the fractures as alarms begin to pulse.

scenes.narration: 문이 닫히는 순간, 당신은 이미 늦었습니다. 플랫폼 끝에서 석상이 한 걸음 더 가까워져 있습니다.

shots.visual_descriptor: Appearance: A gaunt concrete sentinel with obsidian seams.; Distinguishing features: Obsidian eye sockets, Hairline fractures that glow red; Environment: A dim transit-platform containment vault.; Key visual moments: The sentinel stands motionless beneath a flickering platform light., A security monitor catches it one step closer after a blink., Red light leaks from the fractures as alarms begin to pulse.; wide shot of the platform doors sealing while the sentinel stands closer than the observer remembers

scenes.narration: 축축한 콘크리트 냄새가 코를 찌릅니다. 당신이 숨을 고르는 사이 감시 화면 속 위치가 또 달라집니다.

shots.visual_descriptor: Appearance: A gaunt concrete sentinel with obsidian seams.; Distinguishing features: Obsidian eye sockets, Hairline fractures that glow red; Environment: A dim transit-platform containment vault.; Key visual moments: The sentinel stands motionless beneath a flickering platform light., A security monitor catches it one step closer after a blink., Red light leaks from the fractures as alarms begin to pulse.; medium shot of a surveillance monitor revealing the sentinel in a new position between blinks

scenes.narration: 재단은 왜 세 명을 붙여뒀을까요. 한 명이라도 눈을 감는 순간 계산이 무너진다는 뜻입니다.

shots.visual_descriptor: Appearance: A gaunt concrete sentinel with obsidian seams.; Distinguishing features: Obsidian eye sockets, Hairline fractures that glow red; Environment: A dim transit-platform containment vault.; Key visual moments: The sentinel stands motionless beneath a flickering platform light., A security monitor catches it one step closer after a blink., Red light leaks from the fractures as alarms begin to pulse.; overhead view of three exhausted observers holding line of sight down a sterile control corridor

scenes.narration: 근데 여기서 더 이상한 건 그림자입니다. 본체가 멈춘 뒤에도 검은 윤곽이 늦게 따라옵니다.

shots.visual_descriptor: Appearance: A gaunt concrete sentinel with obsidian seams.; Distinguishing features: Obsidian eye sockets, Hairline fractures that glow red; Environment: A dim transit-platform containment vault.; Key visual moments: The sentinel stands motionless beneath a flickering platform light., A security monitor catches it one step closer after a blink., Red light leaks from the fractures as alarms begin to pulse.; low-angle frame where the sentinel is still but its shadow stretches a beat later across the threshold

scenes.narration: 만약 당신이 그 방에 들어간다면 가장 먼저 들리는 건 경보음이 아니라, 발뒤꿈치를 긁는 모래 소리일 겁니다.

shots.visual_descriptor: Appearance: A gaunt concrete sentinel with obsidian seams.; Distinguishing features: Obsidian eye sockets, Hairline fractures that glow red; Environment: A dim transit-platform containment vault.; Key visual moments: The sentinel stands motionless beneath a flickering platform light., A security monitor catches it one step closer after a blink., Red light leaks from the fractures as alarms begin to pulse.; close tracking frame of dust scraping behind a lone walker on the containment walkway

scenes.narration: 이제 정체가 드러납니다. 이 개체는 감시가 끊기는 찰나를 먹고 움직이는, 재단 최악의 시야형 포식자였습니다.

shots.visual_descriptor: Appearance: A gaunt concrete sentinel with obsidian seams.; Distinguishing features: Obsidian eye sockets, Hairline fractures that glow red; Environment: A dim transit-platform containment vault.; Key visual moments: The sentinel stands motionless beneath a flickering platform light., A security monitor catches it one step closer after a blink., Red light leaks from the fractures as alarms begin to pulse.; dossier-style reveal of the sentinel framed as a predator that moves in the instant surveillance breaks

scenes.narration: 솔직히 이 부분은 자료만 봐도 소름 돋습니다. 셔터가 내려온 뒤에도 먼지 자국은 계속 앞으로 이어져 있었거든요.

shots.visual_descriptor: Appearance: A gaunt concrete sentinel with obsidian seams.; Distinguishing features: Obsidian eye sockets, Hairline fractures that glow red; Environment: A dim transit-platform containment vault.; Key visual moments: The sentinel stands motionless beneath a flickering platform light., A security monitor catches it one step closer after a blink., Red light leaks from the fractures as alarms begin to pulse.; floor-level view of fresh dust tracks continuing deeper into a chamber after shutters have sealed

scenes.narration: 게다가 재단은 아직도 이 그림자가 왜 남는지 모릅니다. 본체보다 늦게 도착하는 어둠, 그게 진짜 핵심일지도 모르죠.

shots.visual_descriptor: Appearance: A gaunt concrete sentinel with obsidian seams.; Distinguishing features: Obsidian eye sockets, Hairline fractures that glow red; Environment: A dim transit-platform containment vault.; Key visual moments: The sentinel stands motionless beneath a flickering platform light., A security monitor catches it one step closer after a blink., Red light leaks from the fractures as alarms begin to pulse.; archival close-up of reports mapping a shadow that arrives after the body itself

scenes.narration: 그래서 질문이 남습니다. 당신이 마지막 감시자라면, 눈이 타들어 가는 그 순간에도 끝까지 버틸 수 있을까요.

shots.visual_descriptor: Appearance: A gaunt concrete sentinel with obsidian seams.; Distinguishing features: Obsidian eye sockets, Hairline fractures that glow red; Environment: A dim transit-platform containment vault.; Key visual moments: The sentinel stands motionless beneath a flickering platform light., A security monitor catches it one step closer after a blink., Red light leaks from the fractures as alarms begin to pulse.; eye-level shot of the final observer fighting sleep across the observation deck

scenes.narration: 문서는 끝났지만 이야기는 안 끝났습니다. 지금도 누군가는 그 석상을 보고 있고, 누군가는 깜빡임을 참지 못하고 있으니까요.

shots.visual_descriptor: Appearance: A gaunt concrete sentinel with obsidian seams.; Distinguishing features: Obsidian eye sockets, Hairline fractures that glow red; Environment: A dim transit-platform containment vault.; Key visual moments: The sentinel stands motionless beneath a flickering platform light., A security monitor catches it one step closer after a blink., Red light leaks from the fractures as alarms begin to pulse.; final wide shot of the night watch station where one blink could end the whole shift
